name: Nod
oracleText:
Nod, Country of Wandering enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Exile a card from a graveyard: Draw a card, then discard a card.
flavorText: "And Cain went out from the presence of the Lord, and dwelt in the land of Nod, on the east of Eden." — Genesis 4:16
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses a public-domain Wikimedia Commons expulsion-from-Eden work for Nod's wandering treatment.
title: Country of Wandering
